summary: Good pit recording of a rocking show with a solid performance despite Jerry missing an Althea verse
review: The audience tape captures the energy well, delivering a clear and lively sound that lets listeners enjoy a rock‑filled set. While Jerry slips up by omitting a whole verse of “Althea,” the overall performance remains strong.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights solid show and decent pit recording; minor performance slip keeps rating at four

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pit audience tape praised for capturing the show well; no major sound issues noted

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on flow; overall described as rockin

band_member_comments.Jerry: Forgot an entire verse of Althea but otherwise solid playing
